caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in large gold letters sits at a wooden table in a studio setting. He has a gold watch on his left wrist and is resting his hand on his head. In front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The background features a white wall with a repeating logo that reads "UNICORN HUSTLE" beneath a row of five stars. A blue banner at the top of the wall displays the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug sits on the table with text that includes "TALK OUT". The man remains in a relatively static position across the sequence, with only subtle shifts in his head tilt and gaze, while the environment and equipment remain unchanged.
